notes: Athlete reported on 2026-06-09 that only 1h is available on Wednesday, 1h Thursday, and 2h Friday. This compresses the next three workouts without trying to squeeze the old volume into shorter windows.

workouts.title: One-Hour Endurance Cadence
workouts.objective: Keep Wednesday as low-cost aerobic support after Tuesday tempo.
workouts.why_now: Availability is capped at 1h and Thursday still needs quality. This keeps the build moving without adding fatigue.

targets.notes: 60 minutes easy endurance with optional low-force cadence work. Keep it easy; skip cadence if the back or legs feel stiff.

nutrition.pre: Normal meal timing is enough. If hungry, add 20-30g carbs 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water to thirst; carbs only if starting hungry.
nutrition.centr_recipe: No new Centr link needed; use normal meal fallback.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.next_morning_check: Thursday threshold proceeds only if back and legs feel normal.

skill_focus.why: Skill work should support efficiency without adding fatigue before Thursday.

mental_focus.why: The purpose is frequency and freshness, not proving fitness.
mental_focus.reset: If cadence makes power rise, shift easier or ride steady endurance.

execution_notes.success_criteria: Finish fresher than you started and ready for Thursday.

workouts.title: One-Hour Threshold Progression
workouts.objective: Keep the week's FTP-development stimulus inside a 1h window.
workouts.why_now: Thursday availability is capped at 1h. The right adjustment is shorter threshold quality, not squeezing in the old 90-minute load.

targets.notes: 60 minutes with 3 x 8 min at 92-98% FTP. RPE cap 8. Progression work, not a maximal test.

nutrition.pre: Carb-forward meal 2-4h before. If the ride is close to a meal, add 20-40g simple carbs 30-60 min before.
nutrition.during: Water is fine if well-fed; add 20-30g carbs if starting hungry.
nutrition.post: 25-35g protein plus a normal carb serving.
nutrition.centr_recipe: No new Centr link needed; normal recovery plate fallback.
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: optional caffeine only if tolerated and not late day. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Normal meal, fluids, and easy walking if legs tighten.
recovery.next_morning_check: Friday endurance proceeds if threshold felt controlled and back/legs are normal.

skill_focus.action: Hold the low end first, then progress only if smooth.
skill_focus.why: Shorter threshold still supports FTP if it is repeatable and controlled.
Smooth rebuilds prevent wasted surges in outdoor threshold work.

mental_focus.why: Three clean 8-minute reps are useful training; forcing more does not fit the time window.
mental_focus.reset: If the first rep feels too hard, ride 90-94% FTP for the remaining reps.

pre_interval_cues: Start only if back and legs are normal.
execution_notes.if_too_easy: Hold the cap and finish clean; do not extend.
execution_notes.if_too_hard: Drop to 90-94% FTP or make the third rep tempo.
execution_notes.success_criteria: All three reps controlled with RPE no higher than 8.

workouts.title: Friday Two-Hour Endurance Anchor
workouts.objective: Keep Friday as the weekend endurance anchor within the available 2h window.
workouts.why_now: Friday availability is now 2h, not 2h30. This preserves the long aerobic role without pretending the missing 30 minutes can be recovered.

targets.notes: 2h endurance durability at 58-74% FTP. No tempo finish after Thursday threshold.

steps.notes: Aerobic durability. Fuel early, cap climbs, stay below tempo.

nutrition.pre: Carb-forward meal 2-4h before with about 1-2g carbs/kg.
nutrition.during: Start in the first 30 minutes. Target 45-65g carbs/hour and drink to thirst.
nutrition.post: 25-35g protein plus 60-90g carbs across the next meal window.
nutrition.centr_recipe: High-protein Lentil Braise with Flatbread, Centr collection link: https://centr.com/blog/show/32824/10-high-protein-recipes-for-easy-meal-prep
nutrition.supplements: Today's workout needs: electrolytes/sodium if hot or heavy sweating; otherwise none required. Daily baseline only if already part of routine.

recovery.post_session: Carbs plus protein, fluids to thirst, and 5-10 min easy walk if legs tighten.
recovery.evening: Keep dinner digestible and protect sleep.
recovery.next_morning_check: No mandatory cottage workout debt if weekend bike access is unavailable.

skill_focus.action: Keep climbs capped and seated when practical.
skill_focus.why: This builds aerobic durability without turning endurance into threshold spikes.
Early fuel protects late-ride steadiness and the next training day.

mental_focus.why: Two clean hours are better than forcing extra intensity to replace the missing 30 minutes.
mental_focus.reset: If you chase speed, eat or drink if due, relax grip, and ride below the endurance cap for 2 minutes.

execution_notes.if_too_easy: Finish steady; do not add tempo after Thursday.
execution_notes.success_criteria: Steady power, no depletion, no need to force Saturday.
